requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for Uruguay PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——乌拉圭光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——烏拉圭光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: For Uruguay PV inverter projects, EMC evidence should be mapped to UNIT-adopted or project-specified IEC requirements and to UTE grid-connection review. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for photovoltaic power conversion equipment, and IEC 61000-series test methods and limits are commonly used for emissions and immunity assessment. No automatic acceptance of China-only EMC certificates should be assumed; the project team should confirm whether UNIT conformity documentation, IEC test reports, or UTE-specific evidence is required for the inverter model and installation configuration.
summary.zh: 对于乌拉圭光伏逆变器项目，EMC证据应映射至UNIT采纳或项目指定的IEC要求，并满足UTE并网审查。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列测试方法和限值通常用于排放和抗扰度评估。不应假定仅中国EMC证书会被自动接受；项目团队应确认特定逆变器型号和安装配置是否需要UNIT合格评定文件、IEC测试报告或UTE特定证据。
summary.zht: 對於烏拉圭光伏逆變器項目，EMC證據應映射至UNIT採納或項目指定的IEC要求，並滿足UTE併網審查。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列測試方法和限值通常用於排放和抗擾度評估。不應假定僅中國EMC證書會被自動接受；項目團隊應確認特定逆變器型號和安裝配置是否需要UNIT合格評定文件、IEC測試報告或UTE特定證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emissions and immunity standards
UNIT standards and conformity-assessment framework for Uruguay
UTE project-level grid-connection review for PV inverter installations

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly based on GB/T 37408 and related domestic test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. Those reports may use IEC 61000-family methods in places, but the scope, test configuration, voltage condition, and certification claim should not be treated as equivalent to IEC 62920 or Uruguay project requirements unless an accepted conformity body or the project reviewer confirms equivalence.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常基于GB/T 37408及由CNAS认可实验室出具的相关国内测试报告。这些报告可能在部分项目中使用IEC 61000系列方法，但其范围、测试配置、电压条件和认证声明不应被视为等同于IEC 62920或乌拉圭项目要求，除非获接受的合格评定机构或项目审查方确认等效。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常基於GB/T 37408及由CNAS認可實驗室出具的相關國內測試報告。這些報告可能在部分項目中使用IEC 61000系列方法，但其範圍、測試配置、電壓條件和認證聲明不應被視為等同於IEC 62920或烏拉圭項目要求，除非獲接受的合格評定機構或項目審查方確認等效。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Gap: China-only EMC reports do not automatically satisfy Uruguay project documentation. Exporters should obtain or map IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 test reports for the exact inverter model, power rating, firmware configuration, and installation use case. Confirm whether testing under Uruguay 230/400 V at 50 Hz operating conditions is needed where prior test evidence was prepared under Chinese 220/380 V conditions.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国EMC报告不会自动满足乌拉圭项目文件要求。出口商应为特定逆变器型号、功率等级、固件配置和安装用途取得或映射IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000测试报告。若既有测试证据基于中国220/380 V条件，应确认是否需要按乌拉圭230/400 V 50 Hz运行条件测试。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國EMC報告不會自動滿足烏拉圭項目文件要求。出口商應為特定逆變器型號、功率等級、韌體配置和安裝用途取得或映射IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000測試報告。若既有測試證據基於中國220/380 V條件，應確認是否需要按烏拉圭230/400 V 50 Hz運行條件測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by UNIT conformity assessment, UTE project review, procurement specifications, or the applicable IEC-based project standard
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven under Chinese PV inverter certification practice; not transferable to Uruguay without review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on GB/T 37408 EMC evidence alone for Uruguay PV inverter submissions. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 evidence, map any China test reports line-by-line, and confirm with the local installer, UTE reviewer, or UNIT conformity route whether Uruguay 230/400 V at 50 Hz conditions require supplemental testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌拉圭光伏逆变器提交文件不应仅依赖GB/T 37408 EMC证据。请准备IEC 62920和适用IEC 61000证据，逐项映射任何中国测试报告，并与本地安装商、UTE审查方或UNIT合格评定路径确认乌拉圭230/400 V 50 Hz条件是否需要补充测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏拉圭光伏逆變器提交文件不應僅依賴GB/T 37408 EMC證據。請準備IEC 62920和適用IEC 61000證據，逐項映射任何中國測試報告，並與本地安裝商、UTE審查方或UNIT合格評定路徑確認烏拉圭230/400 V 50 Hz條件是否需要補充測試。
